name: radio-button
title: BTRadioButton
description: Radio button atom with 5 states: default, active, disable, disable-active, and error. Supports optional label and subtext. Uses native <input type="radio"> with transparent overlay for full accessibility. Use multiple BTRadioButton with the same v-model to build a radio group.

files.content:
export { default as BTRadioButton } from './BTRadioButton.vue';
export type { BTRadioButtonProps, BTRadioButtonValue } from './BTRadioButton.types';
